   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MICSTATUS_MICSTATUS_Field
simple_types.code:
type MICSTATUS_MICSTATUS_Field is
   Checkfailed,
   Checkpassed)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: MODE_DATARATE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE_DATARATE_Field is
   Val_1Mbit,
   Val_2Mbit,
   Val_125Kbps,
   Val_500Kbps)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MODE_LENGTH_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE_LENGTH_Field is
   Default,
   Extended)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Default
enumeration_literals.description:
Extended length. Effective length of LENGTH field in encrypted/decrypted
packet is 8 bits. A key-stream for packet payloads up to MAXPACKETSIZE
bytes will be generated.

simple_types.name: MODE_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE_MODE_Field is
   Encryption,
   Decryption)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: RATEOVERRIDE_RATEOVERRIDE_Field
simple_types.code:
type RATEOVERRIDE_RATEOVERRIDE_Field is
   Val_1Mbit,
   Val_2Mbit,
   Val_125Kbps,
   Val_500Kbps)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: SHORTS_ENDKSGEN_CRYPT_Field
simple_types.code:
type SHORTS_ENDKSGEN_CRYPT_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

record_types.name: CCM_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_KSGEN
fields.description:
Start encryption/decryption. This operation will stop by itself when
completed.

fields.name: TASKS_STOP
fields.description:
Override DATARATE setting in MODE register with the contents of the
RATEOVERRIDE register for any ongoing encryption/decryption

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: Pointer to data structure holding AES key and NONCE vector

fields.name: OUTPTR
fields.description: Pointer to data area used for temporary storage

fields.name: SCRATCHPTR
fields.description: Length of key-stream generated when MODE.LENGTH = Extended.

record_types.name: ENABLE_Register
EVENTS_ENDCRYPT_Register
EVENTS_ENDKSGEN_Register
EVENTS_ERROR_Register
INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: ENDKSGEN
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for ENDCRYPT event

fields.name: ENDCRYPT
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for ERROR event

record_types.name: INTENSET_Register

fields.name: ENDKSGEN
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for ENDCRYPT event

fields.name: ENDCRYPT
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for ERROR event

record_types.name: MAXPACKETSIZE_Register
MICSTATUS_Register
MODE_Register

fields.name: Reserved_1_15
fields.description: Radio data rate that the CCM shall run synchronous with

record_types.name: RATEOVERRIDE_Register
SHORTS_Register
TASKS_CRYPT_Register
TASKS_KSGEN_Register
TASKS_RATEOVERRIDE_Register
TASKS_STOP_Register

variables.name: CCM_Periph
variables.code:
CCM_Periph : aliased CCM_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => CCM_Base;
